docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED JUN-24-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YU, LINA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2025 - CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER TO OCT-29-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BAO BEI TAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINA YU IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 08/03/2025. SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUED ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BAO BEI TAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINA YU IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, BAO BEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YU, LINA $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, BAO BEI AS TO DEFENDANT YU, LINA

REMARK: RECEIVED RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON JAN 16, 2025. CERTIFIED MAIL: SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO LINA YU. RETURN TO SENDER, INSUFICIENT ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORMWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TAN, BAO BEI AS TO DEFENDANT YU, LINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-30-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CHRISTOPHER CHANDLER. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BAO BEI TAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINA YU IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS:THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, BAO BEI AS TO DEFENDANT YU, LINA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-18-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BAO BEI TAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINA YU IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-30-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BAO BEI TAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINA YU IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
